summary: Backend-only testing of Luna Group VIP app after major server.py modular refactoring. All 17 route modules successfully extracted and working. 23/23 pytest tests passed (100% success rate). Fixed 2 bugs in points_multiplier access pattern during testing.
critical_code_review_comments: All 17 modular route modules properly registered via ALL_ROUTERS in routes/__init__.py
Routes correctly use APIRouter with proper prefix tags
Fixed points_multiplier key access - was incorrectly accessing tier['benefits']['points_multiplier'] instead of tier.get('points_multiplier', 1.0)
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 modular routes tested and working: health, auth, venues, events, auctions, rewards, missions, notifications, points, subscriptions, bookings, tickets, friends, referrals, boosts, photos, venue_dashboard. The modular architecture is working correctly with FastAPI's include_router pattern.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Changed to tier.get('points_multiplier', 1.0) - points_multiplier is at tier level, not in benefits
